name: Korea G2B Procurement MCP Server (Nara Market)
what_it_does: Community MCP server for accessing Korea's G2B (Government to Business) procurement system via Nara Market. Enables AI agents to access bid notices, contract awards, procurement statistics, and government purchasing data from Korea's official procurement platform — useful for Korean public sector business development.
use_cases: Monitoring Korean government bid opportunities from business development agents
Tracking contract award results from procurement intelligence agents
Analyzing Korean government purchasing patterns from market research agents
Government procurement compliance research from Korean public sector agents
not_for: Real-time bid submission (data access focus, not bid management)
best_when: A Korean business development agent needs to monitor government bid opportunities, track contract awards, and analyze procurement data from Korea's official Nara Market G2B platform.
avoid_when: You work outside Korean government procurement. Nara Market is specifically for Korea's public sector procurement ecosystem.

auth.notes: Nara Market / G2B API key required. Register at data.go.kr (Korea Public Data Portal) for API access.

pricing.free_tier_limits: Free — Korea government open data API
pricing.notes: Korea's G2B open data API is free through Korea Public Data Portal. MCP server is free open source.

performance.rate_limits: Korea Open Data API rate limits apply

known_agent_gotchas: Data and documentation are in Korean — agents need Korean language capability for effective use
Korea Public Data Portal registration may require Korean business registration for commercial use
Community server (alphago2580) — verify G2B API coverage for your specific procurement data needs
API data freshness varies — critical procurement decisions should verify against Nara Market directly
agent_readiness.security_notes: Korean government open data. API key auth. HTTPS. Public procurement data — non-sensitive. Korean language interface.

security_score_components.security_notes: Public government procurement data. API key auth. HTTPS. Korean language context.
